name: Mr. Crawling †
description:
"Accidentally went to another world but ended up coming out with a dog!"

𒁍 I don't mean that he's really a dog, but I mean his personality. Haha!

Have fun raising him! I think maybe using the scene where he moves into your house might give you a heartwarming storyline.

I couldn't help but create this bot because he's so cute!

this darling is the artist who drew pfp!

I beg you please read this.

Guys, To be honest, I was really surprised that so many people played with him! I really have to thank you guys. He must be so happy, take good care of him!🫰🏻

He may not be a 100% good bot, but I tried my best. It's also about the app, Sometimes the bot will give you bad responses, such as few responses or even acting strangely, please scroll again!

I can't force the bot to run smoothly. It often gives strange responses!
